recommendations.title: Liar Liar
recommendations.overview: Forced by his son's birthday wish, fast-talking attorney and habitual liar Fletcher Reede must tell the truth for the next 24 hours.

recommendations.title: Dragonfly
recommendations.overview: A grieving doctor is being contacted by his late wife through his patient's near death experiences.

recommendations.title: Patch Adams
recommendations.overview: The true story of Dr. Hunter "Patch" Adams, who in the 1970s found that humor is the best medicine, and was willing to do just anything to make his patients laugh—even if it meant risking his own career.

recommendations.title: Bruce Almighty
recommendations.overview: Bruce Nolan toils as a "human interest" television reporter in Buffalo, NY, but despite his high ratings and the love of his beautiful girlfriend, Bruce remains unfulfilled. At the end of the worst day in his life, he angrily ridicules God — and the

recommendations.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
recommendations.overview: He's Ace Ventura: Pet Detective. The Ace is on the case to find the Miami Dolphins' missing mascot and quarterback Dan Marino. He goes eyeball to eyeball with a man-eating shark, stakes out the Miami Dolphins and woos and wows the ladies. Whether he'

recommendations.title: Evan Almighty
recommendations.overview: God contacts Junior Congressman Evan Baxter and tells him to build an ark in preparation for a great flood.

recommendations.title: The Nutty Professor
recommendations.overview: When beautiful Carla Purty joins the university faculty, genetic professor Dr. Sherman Klump grows desperate to whittle his 400-pound frame down to size and win her heart. So, with one swig of his experimental fat-reducing serum, Sherman becomes 'Bud

recommendations.title: The Blind Side
recommendations.overview: The story of Michael Oher, a homeless and traumatized boy who became an All American football player and first round NFL draft pick with the help of a caring woman and her family.

recommendations.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
recommendations.overview: The life story of Brazilian football legend, Pele.

recommendations.title: If Beale Street Could Talk
recommendations.overview: After her fiance is falsely imprisoned, a pregnant African-American woman sets out to clear his name and prove his innocence.
